parameters.url: ={{ $env.SUPABASE_URL }}/rest/v1/content_insights?client_id=eq.{{ $('Validate HMAC + Fetch Data').item.json.client_id }}&research_run_id=eq.{{ $('Validate HMAC + Fetch Data').item.json.research_run_id }}&order=score.desc&limit=30&select=*

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Validate HMAC + Fetch Data').item.json.client_id, week_start: $('Validate HMAC + Fetch Data').item.json.week_start, status: 'generating', prompt_version: 'v1' }) }}

nodes.name: Template 1 — Research Summary

parameters.jsonBody: =See prompts/research-summary-v1.md for full prompt. Construct JSON body dynamically from client_config + top 30 insights.

nodes.notes: In production: build the full messages array from research-summary-v1.md template + data. See prompts/ directory.

parameters.jsonBody: =See prompts/script-generator-v1.md for full prompt. Inject research_summary + pattern-library top 3 + last week top performer.

_meta.templateNotes: Requires: SUPABASE_URL, CLAUDE_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, GITHUB_OWNER, GITHUB_REPO, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, N8N_SHARED_SECRET env vars. Add separate webhook handler for Telegram callback_data (approve_all, reject_all) — triggers Production Agent or re-runs Template 2 with feedback.
